title: 1 step DFU - Update All button triggers DFU for earbuds and charge case
scenario: "Update All" button triggers a single-step DFU process for both earbuds and charge case simultaneously, showing one unified progress bar from 0% to 99% on a single screen.
steps: Locate the 'Update All' button on the device management screen.
Tap the 'Update All' button to initiate the DFU process.
Observe the progress bar displayed on the screen.
Monitor the progress bar as it advances from 0% to 99%.
Wait for the DFU process to complete for both earbuds and charge case.
expected: Both earbuds and charge case update simultaneously with a single unified progress bar (0% to 99%) displayed on one screen.
